.@RepLuna’s message to Heritage’s Miami Security Forum: “The United States has a clear interest in securing our Western hemisphere as well as providing freedom and stability, grounded in sovereignty, rule of law, and economic freedom.”

Video

Americans want their votes protected. Voter ID and citizenship verification are commonsense ways to keep American elections secure! nitter.net/CBSNews/status/2035050…


CBS News (@CBSNews)

CBS NEWS POLL: Requiring photo ID to vote and proving citizenship to register both find wide and often bipartisan support among Americans, while most also say voting by mail is OK. cbsn.ws/4lDMuR0

MONDAY: Voices from medical research, law, farming, and health advocacy come together at Heritage for an in-depth and nuanced conversation about the growing debate over pesticide use in American agriculture. Register to watch here: heritage.org/government-regu…
Watch our full event with conservative women having candid conversations about marriage, motherhood, and careers here: heritage.org/conservatism/ev…

Heritage Policy Analyst @emlwaters once broke up with the man who would later become her husband because she was afraid of having children at the expense of her career aspirations. Then she was reminded of what mattered most in life.

“ Instead of just finding ourselves slaves to a given career, what if we were incredibly strategic and actually approach this saying, what do I want out of this arrangement, and what job will help fit in with my vision and hope for family?”

Video
Watch this full event, Catholicism and the American Founding, here: heritage.org/religious-liber…

“ The right to own property is an extension of the dignity of the human person.” - Dr. Elizabeth Spalding

The Left may patronize private property ownership and wealth, but both are key to full participation in and stewardship of creation.

Video

uncategorized.quote: This week, conservative women in every season of life gathered at Heritage to lay out a vision for how women can navigate policy and cultural challenges surrounding marriage, motherhood, and careers.
